content: Prepare to step beyond the Origin System and enter Tau in 2026. Once a paradise built by the Sentients, Tau has been lost to war and ruin. Nowhere is this felt more keenly than on the black rain-soaked streets of Fornax, a colossal Sentient ring city. Here, the devastating downpour and its maddening influence run in rivulets from the heights of the Hunra's gambling dens, through the Docks, and into the most desperate Slums — where the residents have turned to the mind-altering Bloom in search of escape. There, Albrecht Entrati awaits the arrival of the Tenno after conscripting the inner monologuing and noir-inspired Warframe, Brysko, to infiltrate the Hunra's criminal underworld — a final gamble to avert Fornax falling to those with nothing to lose. Get ready to risk it all. Warframe: Tau arrives later this year. ►► WHAT IS WARFRAME? Join 90M+ registered players in Warframe, a cooperative, free-to-play third-person looter shooter set in a constantly evolving sci-fi universe. For more info, visit https://warframe.com. Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/warframe X: https://www.twitter.com/playwarframe Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/warframe.com Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/playwarframe Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playwarframe TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@playwarframe Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/warframe Discord: https://discord.com/invite/playwarframe #Warframe #Gameplay #Trailer #PC #PlayStation #Xbox #NintendoSwitch #NintendoSwitch2 #iOS #Android
